brand_identity.name: BioLumina Agency
brand_identity.theme_strategy: Light Mode Primary (Clinical/Clean) with Dark Mode Option (Deep Tech)

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. Tracking tight (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for paragraphs and UI text. Relaxed line-height.

mono.usage: Use for data points, tags, and 'scientific' captions.

glassmorphism.standard: bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 shadow-sm
glassmorphism.heavy: bg-white/90 dark:bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-md

gradients.text_gradient: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-teal-600 to-cyan-600 dark:from-teal-400 dark:to-cyan-400

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(13,148,136,0.3)] transition-all hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-6 py-4

cards.service_card: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl bg-card border border-border p-8 hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-teal-500/10 transition-all duration-500
cards.feature_card: bg-white/50 dark:bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-border/50 rounded-2xl p-6

inputs.default: h-12 rounded-lg border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: npm install framer-motion lucide-react (if not present)
SETUP: Add the Google Fonts imports to the top of index.css
THEME: Configure tailwind.config.js with the colors provided in the 'colors' section. Use CSS variables for theme switching.
LAYOUT: Do NOT use standard Bootstrap columns. Use the Bento Grid strategy for the Services section.
NAVBAR: Create a floating glass navbar that sits 32px from the top of the screen on desktop, with rounded-full corners.
IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs. Do NOT use placeholders.
TESTING: Add data-testid to all buttons, inputs, and links.
universal_guidelines: No gradients on body text - only on headings or special accents.
Do not center-align long text blocks. Left align for readability.
Use generous padding (p-8, p-12) inside cards.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (WCAG AA).
Avoid generic 'AI' emojis. Use Phosphor or Lucide icons.
